data.name: kettlebell one arm clean and jerk
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell one arm floor press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: kettlebell one arm jerk
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm.
Step:4 As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum.
Step:5 As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips.
Step:6 Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead.
Step:7 Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell one arm military press to the side
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell one arm push press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell one arm row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

data.name: kettlebell one arm snatch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand between your legs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your hand and punch it straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down between your legs and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell pirate supper legs
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kettlebell pistol squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Lift your left foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your right foot flat on the ground and your left leg extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

data.name: kettlebell plyo push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell seated press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell seated press with high
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Focus on high movement.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell seated two arm military press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell seesaw press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell sumo high pull
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin.
Step:5 As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell swing
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, pushing your butt back.
Step:4 Swing the kettlebell back between your legs, keeping your arms straight and maintaining a flat back.
Step:5 Drive your hips forward and swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height, using the momentum generated by your hips.
Step:6 Allow the kettlebell to swing back down between your legs and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell thruster
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Step:4 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell turkish get up (squat style)
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended.
Step:3 Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position.
Step:4 Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground.
Step:5 Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support.
Step:6 Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position.
Step:7 From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead.
Step:8 Reverse the movement to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.

data.name: kettlebell two arm clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell two arm military press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell two arm row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell windmill
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead.
Step:2 Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward.
Step:3 Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Step:4 Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: kick out sit
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lean back slightly and place your hands on the edge of the bench or chair for support.
Step:3 Engaging your hamstrings, lift your feet off the ground and extend your legs straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees and bring your feet back towards your body.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kipping muscle up
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
Step:3 As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement.
Step:4 Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kipping muscle up with triple
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
Step:3 As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement. Emphasize triple control.
Step:4 Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: knee touch crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kneeling jump squat
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips.
Step:5 Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Step:6 Immediately go into the next repetition, repeating the jump squat motion.

data.name: kneeling lat stretch
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing back.
Step:2 Extend your arms overhead and interlace your fingers.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly lean to the right side, feeling a stretch in your left lat muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the stretch on the left side, leaning to the left and feeling a stretch in your right lat muscle.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kneeling plank tap shoulder (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kneeling push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your hands shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, so that your body forms a straight line from head to heels.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your chest is just above the ground, then push back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: korean dips
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms extended and supporting your body weight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: l-pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: l-sit on floor
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:4 Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can.
Step:6 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: landmine 180
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder.
Step:4 Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: landmine lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lean planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands.
Step:3 Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: left hook. boxing
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin.
Step:3 Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion.
Step:4 Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch.
Step:5 Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: leg pull in flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: leg up hamstring stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin.
Step:3 Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.

data.name: lever alternate leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever alternating narrow grip seated row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back straight and feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and shoulders back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull one handle towards your torso while keeping the other handle stationary.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat with the other side.
Step:8 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever assisted chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever assisted chin-up with twisted
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Step:2 Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Step:4 (twisted variation) Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever back extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or grip bars.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back.
Step:6 Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever bent-over row with v-bar
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side supports for stability.
Step:4 Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders.
Step:6 Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes.
Step:7 Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever decline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever front pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever gripless shrug
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever gripless shrug v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever gripper hands
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever hammer grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever high row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and foot platform to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever hip extension v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever horizontal one leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

data.name: lever incline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever incline chest press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever kneeling leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Kneel on the machine facing downwards, with your knees resting on the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, fully extending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever kneeling twist
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the twist to the opposite side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever leg extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:4 Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever lying leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever lying two-one leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever military press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever military press with strength
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 (strength variation) Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever narrow grip seated row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever narrow grip seated row - strength variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Maintain strength form throughout.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever one arm bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Step:3 Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever one arm lateral high row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side.
Step:4 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever one arm lateral wide pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: lever one arm shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: lever overhand triceps dip
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad.
Step:4 Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever preacher curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever pullover
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and handles of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and grasp the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your arms slightly bent and your core engaged.
Step:4 Slowly pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your lats.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse grip lateral pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse grip preacher curl with precision
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Maintain precision form throughout.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse grip vertical row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse hyperextension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad.
Step:3 Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever reverse t-bar row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever rotary calf
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you.
Step:4 Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated crunch (chest pad)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated crunch v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated dip
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated good morning
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Place your hands on the side handles for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated hip adduction
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: lever seated leg raise crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
